General.Name: China Water Industry Group Ltd
General.Description: China Water Industry Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides water supply and sewage treatment services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through four segments: Provision of Water Supply, Sewage Treatment and Construction Services; Exploitation and Sales of Renewable Energy; Property Investment and Development; and Waste management and recycling segments. The company offers construction services, such as water meter installation, infrastructure and pipeline construction, and repair. It is also involved in the installation of water supply facilities; and trading, water pipeline network, glass recycling, and administrative services. In addition, the company engages in the exploitation, generation and sale of renewable energy, sewage treatment, waste management and recycling, and environmental protection equipment sales and technical services. Further, it develops and sells commercial and residential units. The company was formerly known as Sky Hawk Computer Group Limited and changed its name to China Water Industry Group Limited in November 2006. China Water Industry Group Limited was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.

1.Name: Ms. Yin Yin  Chu CPA
